---
pagetitle: "Darrell Wolfe | Storyteller, Data Nerd, Biblical Studies Thinker, and Professional Collector of Too Many Interests"
description: "Stories, systems, scripture, spreadsheets, and the strange overlap between them."
---

::: {.hero-shell}
# Darrell Wolfe {.hero-title}

Storyteller, Data Nerd, Biblical Studies Thinker, and Professional Collector of Too Many Interests

Stories, systems, scripture, spreadsheets, and the strange overlap between them. This is the home for all of it: creative writing, biblical studies, data storytelling, and personal essays.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Author](posts/writing/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Biblical Studies](posts/biblical/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Data Nerd](posts/data-nerd/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Personal](posts/personal/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.section-panel}
## Start Here

Welcome to my digital home.

I built this site to hold the full range of what I do instead of splitting it into separate, disconnected brands. Because the truth is, these interests were never separate. They all come from the same fascination with meaning, pattern, structure, and story.

Here you'll find fiction and worldbuilding, biblical studies and historical context, practical data work and visualization, and personal writing that doesn't fit neatly anywhere else.
:::

## Browse by Section

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.card}
### [Author](posts/writing/index.qmd)
Speculative fiction, story craft, worldbuilding, and the ongoing work of becoming a better writer.
:::

::: {.card}
### [Biblical Studies](posts/biblical/index.qmd)
Research, interpretation, and reflections shaped by ancient context and a deep interest in reading texts well.
:::

::: {.card}
### [Data Nerd](posts/data-nerd/index.qmd)
SQL, dashboards, reporting, analytics, automation, and the craft of making information useful.
:::

::: {.card}
### [Personal](posts/personal/index.qmd)
Essays, reflections, side quests, and the rest of the glorious mess.
:::
:::

::: {.section-panel}
## Why This Site Exists

For a long time, I treated these as separate parts of my life. But they belong together.

This site is one place for the full picture: the writer, the analyst, the researcher, the question-asker, and the human being trying to make sense of things.

Take a look around.
:::
